## Scope

- This ledger keeps the requirement-linking rule narrow: only exact `ExtData[*].Val6` matches against known `RequirementId` rows are treated as requirement references.
- It makes requirement rows inspectable by showing inbound references, direct child requirement links, active ext-data fields, and the ability-context tags attached to direct usage.
